get.description: List the operations for the provider

post.description: virtualMachinesCancelOperations: cancelOperations for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesExecuteDeallocate: executeDeallocate for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesExecuteHibernate: executeHibernate for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesExecuteStart: executeStart for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesGetOperationStatus: getOperationStatus for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesSubmitDeallocate: submitDeallocate for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesSubmitHibernate: submitHibernate for a virtual machine
virtualMachinesSubmitStart: submitStart for a virtual machine

ActionType.description: Specify which action user wants to the auto action to perform on the resources

values.name: Start
values.description: Auto action should perform a start action on the specified resources

values.name: Deallocate
values.description: Auto action should perform a deallocate action on the specified resources

values.name: Hibernate
values.description: Auto action should perform hibernate and deallocate on the specified resources

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

resourceType.description: The type of resource the auto action is targeting

actionType.description: The action the auto action should perform in the resources

startTime.description: The time which the auto action is supposed to start running

endTime.description: The time when the auto action is supposed to stop scheduling

resources.description: The list of the resources the auto action is supposed to perform the actions on

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

schedule.description: The schedule the auto action is supposed to follow

provisioningState.description: The status of the last provisioning operation performed on the resource.

upcomingOccurrences.description: The list of upcoming occurrences for the auto action

lastOccurrences.description: The list of upcoming occurrnces for the auto action

isDisabled.description: Tell if the auto action is disabled or not

AutoActionSchedule.description: Specify the schedule in which the auto action is supposed to follow

scheduledTime.description: The time the auto action is supposed to run on

timeZone.description: The timezone the scheduled time is specified on

requestedWeekDays.description: The week days the auto action is supposed to run on

requestedMonths.description: The months the auto action is supposed to run on

requestedDaysOfTheMonth.description: The days of the month the auto action is supposed to run on

executionParameters.description: The execution parameters the auto action is supposed to follow

deadlineType.description: The type of deadline the auto action is supposed to follow for the schedule

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

Azure.Core.Foundations.InnerError.description: An object containing more specific information about the error. As per Microsoft One API guidelines - https://github.com/Microsoft/api-guidelines/blob/vNext/Guidelines.md#7102-error-condition-responses.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

CancelOperationsRequest.description: This is the request to cancel running operations in scheduled actions using the operation ids

operationIds.description: The list of operation ids to cancel operations on

CancelOperationsResponse.description: This is the response from a cancel operations request

results.description: An array of resource operations that were successfully cancelled

DayOfTheMonth.description: Represents the possible days in a month

DeadlineType.description: The types of deadlines supported by ScheduledActions

values.name: InitiateAt
values.description: Initiate the operation at the given deadline.

values.name: CompleteBy
values.description: Complete the operation by the given deadline.

DeallocateResourceOperationResponse.description: The response from a deallocate request

description.description: The description of the operation response

type.description: The type of resources used in the deallocate request eg virtual machines

location.description: The location of the deallocate request eg westus

results.description: The results from the deallocate request if no errors exist

ExecuteDeallocateRequest.description: The ExecuteDeallocateRequest request for executeDeallocate operations

executionParameters.description: The execution parameters for the request

ExecuteHibernateRequest.description: The ExecuteHibernateRequest request for executeHibernate operations

executionParameters.description: The execution parameters for the request

ExecuteStartRequest.description: The ExecuteStartRequest request for executeStart operations

executionParameters.description: The execution parameters for the request

ExecutionParameters.description: Extra details needed to run the user's request

optimizationPreference.description: Details that could optimize the user's request

retryPolicy.description: Retry policy the user can pass

GetOperationStatusRequest.description: This is the request to get operation status using operationids

operationIds.description: The list of operation ids to get the status of

GetOperationStatusResponse.description: This is the response from a get operations status request

results.description: An array of resource operations based on their operation ids

HibernateResourceOperationResponse.description: The response from a Hibernate request

description.description: The description of the operation response

type.description: The type of resources used in the Hibernate request eg virtual machines

location.description: The location of the Hibernate request eg westus

results.description: The results from the Hibernate request if no errors exist

Month.description: Representation of the months in a gregorian calendar

OccurrenceState.description: The state the occurrence is at a given time

values.name: Failed
values.description: The occurrence has failed during its scheduling

values.name: Cancelling
values.description: The occurrence is going through cancellation

scheduledTime.description: The time the occurrence was scheduled for

resources.description: The list of resources the occurrence is targeting

items.description: A type definition that refers the id to an Azure Resource Manager resource.

state.description: The current state of the occurrence

OperationState.description: Values that define the states of operations in Scheduled Actions

values.name: Unknown
values.description: The default value for the operation state enum

values.name: PendingExecution
values.description: Operations that are waiting to be executed

values.name: Executing
values.description: Operations that are in the process of being executed

values.name: Cancelled
values.description: Operations that have been cancelled by the user

OptimizationPreference.description: The preferences customers can select to optimize their requests to ScheduledActions

values.name: Availability
values.description: Optimize while considering availability of resources

values.name: CostAvailabilityBalanced
values.description: Optimize while considering a balance of cost and availability

ResourceOperation.description: High level response from an operation on a resource

resourceId.description: Unique identifier for the resource involved in the operation, eg ArmId

errorCode.description: Resource level error code if it exists

errorDetails.description: Resource level error details if they exist

operation.description: Details of the operation performed on a resource

ResourceOperationDetails.description: The details of a response from an operation on a resource

operationId.description: Operation identifier for the unique operation

resourceId.description: Unique identifier for the resource involved in the operation, eg ArmId

opType.description: Type of operation performed on the resources
